chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-680 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on M.A.No.3106/2021 (U/ A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.3107/2021 (E/ A). 04. For orders on M.A.No.3108/2021 (S/ A). 05. For hearing of main case. 22.12.2021 Mr. Abdul Wahab Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioners. = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioners that the private respondents have launched an illegal residential scheme by selling the plots in agricultural land adjacent to Girls Primary School of their village, therefore, the official respondents be directed to entrain the application of the petitioners for redressal of their grievance. If the petitioner is having a feeling that the residential scheme is launched by the private respondents illegally, then they have alternate and adequate remedy to exhaust before forum having jurisdiction, for redressal of their grievance. The straight away filing of instant constitutional petition before this Court with sole object that the official respondents be directed to entertain their application for redressal of their grievance, apparently is misconceived. It is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E
